items.title: Automating contract intelligence with Doczy.ai™ on AWS

items.title: AWS HealthOmics now supports Nextflow version pinning at run time
items.snippet: AWS HealthOmics now allows customers to specify the Nextflow engine version at run time via the StartRun API, enabling customers to pin runs to a specific Nextflow version for controlled migration. With this launch, customers can select from supported…

items.title: AWS HealthOmics now supports Nextflow version 26.04
items.snippet: AWS HealthOmics now supports Nextflow version 26.04, enabling customers to take advantage of new Nextflow features and enhancements: record types, the strict syntax parser, workflow output summaries, and agent logging mode. AWS HealthOmics is a HIPAA-eligible…

items.title: Scaling oncology patient support: How New York Cancer and Blood Specialists transformed customer experience with AWS and Pronetx, now part of Caylent
items.snippet: This post details how NYCBS partnered with Amazon Web Services (AWS) and AWS partner Pronetx (now part of Caylent) to migrate to Amazon Connect Customer, the AWS cloud contact center service. The migration delivered a 54 percent improvement in patient…

items.title: Get started with OpenAI GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4 models, and Codex on Amazon Bedrock
items.snippet: OpenAI frontier models GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.4, and Codex, the OpenAI coding agent, are now generally available on Amazon Bedrock. Deploy frontier models on Bedrock's high performance inference engine with built-in security, governance, and pay-per-token pricing.

items.title: Quick Research now supports customer managed keys
items.snippet: Amazon Quick Research now enables customers to encrypt their data using customer-managed keys (CMK) through AWS Key Management Service (KMS). This enhancement allows organizations with strict security and compliance requirements to manage their own encryption…

items.title: Amazon Quick now supports VPC connectivity for MCP connections
items.snippet: Amazon Quick now enables enterprise customers to connect their privately hosted Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to Quick through Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC). Amazon Quick is an AI assistant that turns questions into answers, answers into actions,…

items.title: Amazon SageMaker adds permissions boundaries for SCP compliance
items.snippet: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio now supports custom IAM permissions boundaries, so organizations that enforce Service Control Policies (SCPs) requiring permissions boundaries on all IAM roles can adopt SageMaker Unified Studio without modifying their security…

items.title: Building a scalable user search layer on top of Amazon Cognito
items.snippet: In this post, we show how to build a comprehensive scalable user search layer on top of Amazon Cognito using AWS Lambda, Amazon DynamoDB, and Amazon OpenSearch Service.

items.snippet: Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) now supports tenant-level suppression lists, allowing email senders to isolate bounces and complaints per tenant. Previously, all tenants in an account shared a single suppression list, meaning one tenant's email…
